prompt_used: Create original premium horror artwork for a commercial alternate reality investigation game. Subject: ending illustration. Story world: The Fourth Tenant. Recurring motifs: door chains, wet plaster, rent slips. Ending card for "Compromised Truth" (PYRRHIC). Summary: You expose fraud, but a key tenant disappears from all records.. Deliver emotional closure with sequel-hook tension.. Subgenre: supernatural mystery. Tone: EERIE. Immediate scene brief: The Fourth Tenant - Compromised Truth Ending Card. Grounded cinematic horror, photoreal detail, rich atmosphere, practical lighting, believable materials, analog grain, subtle lens bloom, visible depth. No title treatment, no UI overlay, no case notes panel, no labels, no watermark, no logo, no poster typography, no debug text. Compose a high-end key art image with a dominant focal threat, layered foreground and background storytelling, a strong silhouette, and clear thematic clues embedded in the environment. Keep it elegant, unsettling, and market-ready.
